# Cloaks
# https://revenge-of-the-fallen-rotmg.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Cloaks&prop=wikitext

This page includes both custom cloaks and old cloaks that have been edited from how they appear on the preduction RotMG server.
{| class="article-table"
!Cloaks
!Buffs                        
!Stats
!MP Cost
!Cooldown
!Fame Bonus
!Tier
!Legendary/Primal
Effect
|-
|Deepspace Veil
|Invisible: 6 sec 
|<nowiki>+5spd</nowiki>
+3vit

+3wis

+4dex
|90
|7 sec
|6%
|GL
|
|-
|Destructor Cloak
|Invisible: 4 sec
Damaging: 2 sec

Berserk: 2 sec
|
|110
|5 sec
|6%
|Heroic
|
|-
|Cloak of the 1000 Oceans
|Invisible: 2 sec
Speedy 2 sec
|
|90
|2 sec
|6%
|Heroic
|
|-
|Shadow Scales
|Invisible: 5 sec
Speedy: 5 sec
|<nowiki>+5att</nowiki>
+5spd

+50hp

+50mp
|95
|5 sec
|5%
|Artifact
|
|-
|Spectral's Cloak
|Invisible: 2.5 sec
Speedy: 2.5 sec 

Damaging: 2.5 sec

Shots: 5

Damage: 200-400

Range: 7.2
|
|110
|3.5 sec
|8%
|Unknown
|Last Hope
|-
|Cloak of the Planewalker
|Invisible: 5.5 sec
Teleport to Cursor
|<nowiki>+5spd</nowiki>
+4dex
|100
|6.5 sec
|6%
|Legendary
|Throwback
|}
